name: execution-policy
description: Governs the overall execution lifecycle of the Website Factory pipeline — phase ordering, gate conditions, and abort criteria.

phaseOrdering.description: Phases must execute in defined order. A phase cannot start until the previous phase completes or is explicitly skipped.

gateConditions.description: Each phase transition requires a gate check before proceeding.

buildGate.description: npm run build must pass before proceeding to the next phase

abortCriteria.description: Execution must abort immediately if any of these conditions are met.
conditions: target URL is unreachable after 3 retries

parallelExecution.description: Builder agents may execute in parallel within a phase, but phases themselves are sequential.
